name: standards catalog: duplicate ids in standards/sources.yaml rejected at load
command:
printf -- "- id: dup
  name: A
  url: https://a.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
  class: published-standard
  authority_tier: 1
  fragility_tier: low
  fragility_strategy: silent-replace
  fetcher: html-anchor.sh
  identifier_pattern: x
  license_note: x
  origin: bundled
  added_by: plugin
  added_at: 2026-05-04
- id: dup
  name: B
  url: https://b.com
  tier: 2
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
  class: published-standard
  authority_tier: 2
  fragility_tier: low
  fragility_strategy: silent-replace
  fetcher: html-anchor.sh
  identifier_pattern: x
  license_note: x
  origin: bundled
  added_by: plugin
  added_at: 2026-05-04
" > sources.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-standards-catalog.sh" "$PWD/sources.yaml"
